# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Add falcoctl dependency while building falco
ADD_FALCOCTL_DEPENDENCY:BOOL=ON

//Build the BPF driver on Linux
BUILD_BPF:BOOL=OFF

//Build the driver on Linux
BUILD_DRIVER:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_FALCO_MODERN_BPF:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Build falco unit tests
BUILD_FALCO_UNIT_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build libscap examples
BUILD_LIBSCAP_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//OFF
BUILD_LIBSCAP_GVISOR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable modern bpf probe
BUILD_LIBSCAP_MODERN_BPF:BOOL=ON

//Build libsinsp examples
BUILD_LIBSINSP_EXAMPLES:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Enable building with -Wextra -Werror flags
BUILD_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/opt/cross-compile/arm-gnu-toolchain-11.3.rel1-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-addr2line

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/opt/cross-compile/arm-gnu-toolchain-11.3.rel1-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/opt/cross-compile/arm-gnu-toolchain-11.3.rel1-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=--sysroot=/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/opt/cross-compile/arm-gnu-toolchain-11.3.rel1-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/opt/cross-compile/arm-gnu-toolchain-11.3.rel1-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=--sysroot=/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=--sysroot=/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux -L/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux/lib -L/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux/usr/lib

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/install_ebpf

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=--sysroot=/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux -L/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux/lib -L/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux/usr/lib

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:UNINITIALIZED=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/toolchain-aarch64.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to the coverage program that CTest uses for performing coverage
// inspection
COVERAGE_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcov

//Extra command line flags to pass to the coverage tool
COVERAGE_EXTRA_FLAGS:STRING=-l

//Enable to build RPM source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TBZ2 source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TBZ2:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TGZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TXZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build ZIP source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_ZIP:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CPPCHECK:FILEPATH=CPPCHECK-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CPPCHECK_HTMLREPORT:FILEPATH=CPPCHECK_HTMLREPORT-NOTFOUND

//Enable make-targets for unit testing
CREATE_TEST_TARGETS:BOOL=OFF

//How many times to retry timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_COUNT:STRING=3

//How long to wait between timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_DELAY:STRING=5

//Maximum time allowed before CTest will kill the test.
DART_TESTING_TIMEOUT:STRING=1500

//Enable DKMS on Linux
ENABLE_DKMS:BOOL=ON

//Enable bpf engine
ENABLE_ENGINE_BPF:BOOL=ON

//Enable kernel module engine
ENABLE_ENGINE_KMOD:BOOL=ON

//Enable inspector thread pool
ENABLE_THREAD_POOL:BOOL=OFF

//ExternalProject update disconnected
EP_UPDATE_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for libelf_elftoolchain
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_LIBELF_ELFTOOLCHAIN:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for nlohmann_json
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_NLOHMANN_JSON:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for yamlcpp
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_YAMLCPP:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of libelf_elftoolchain
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_LIBELF_ELFTOOLCHAIN:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of nlohmann_json
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_NLOHMANN_JSON:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of yamlcpp
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_YAMLCPP:BOOL=OFF

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Build the unit tests when BUILD_TESTING is enabled.
JSON_BuildTests:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CI build targets.
JSON_CI:BOOL=OFF

//Use extended diagnostic messages.
JSON_Diagnostics:BOOL=OFF

//Disable default integer enum serialization.
JSON_DisableEnumSerialization:BOOL=OFF

//Place use-defined string literals in the global namespace.
JSON_GlobalUDLs:BOOL=ON

//Enable implicit conversions.
JSON_ImplicitConversions:BOOL=ON

//Install CMake targets during install step.
JSON_Install:BOOL=OFF

//Enable legacy discarded value comparison.
JSON_LegacyDiscardedValueComparison:BOOL=OFF

//Use non-amalgamated version of the library.
JSON_MultipleHeaders:BOOL=ON

//Include as system headers (skip for clang-tidy).
JSON_SystemInclude:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a library.
LIB_ANL:FILEPATH=/opt/ti-processor-sdk-linux-adas-j721e-evm-09_02_00_05/linux-devkit/sysroots/aarch64-oe-linux/usr/lib/libanl.so

MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/usr/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-NOTFOUND

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

// and basic input/output (EXPERIMENTAL)
MINIMAL_BUILD:BOOL=ON

MODERN_BPFTOOL_EXE:UNINITIALIZED=/usr/sbin/bpftool

//Enable BPF debug prints
MODERN_BPF_DEBUG_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Regex to exclude tail-called programs
MODERN_BPF_EXCLUDE_PROGS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to clang executable
MODERN_CLANG_EXE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/clang

//Path to a program.

SITE:STRING=ASUS-UX3404VA

//Halt on error when building with UBSan
UBSAN_HALT_ON_ERROR:BOOL=ON

//Build with AddressSanitizer
USE_ASAN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable building of the bundled cxxopts
USE_BUNDLED_CXXOPTS:BOOL=ON

//Enable bundled dependencies instead of using the system ones
USE_BUNDLED_DEPS:BOOL=ON

//Enable building of the bundled jsoncpp

//Enable building of the bundled libbpf

//Enable downloading of the bundled uthash library

//Enable building of the bundled valijson

//Enable building of the bundled yamlcpp
USE_BUNDLED_YAMLCPP:BOOL=ON

//Enable building of the bundled zlib
USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically link libelf
USE_DYNAMIC_LIBELF:BOOL=OFF

//Build with frame pointers for accurate profiling
USE_FRAME_POINTER:BOOL=OFF

//Build with gperftools CPU profiler support
USE_GPERFTOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//When not using bundled libelf, link it dynamically
USE_SHARED_LIBELF:BOOL=ON

//Build with UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer
USE_UBSAN:BOOL=OFF

//Build yaml-cpp shared library
YAML_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake

//Enable parse tools

//Disable uninstallation of yaml-cpp

//Dependencies for the target

//Dependencies for the target
scap_engine_nodriver_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap_engine_noop;general;scap_error;

//Dependencies for the target
scap_engine_noop_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap_error;

//Dependencies for the target
scap_engine_savefile_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap_engine_noop;general;scap_platform_util;general;/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/zlib-prefix/src/zlib/libz.a;general;scap_error;

//Dependencies for the target
scap_engine_source_plugin_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap_event_schema;general;scap_engine_noop;general;scap_error;

//Dependencies for the target
scap_event_schema_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;driver_event_schema;general;scap_error;

//Dependencies for the target
scap_platform_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap_error;general;scap_platform_util;

//Dependencies for the target
sinsp_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;scap;general;/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/jsoncpp-prefix/src/lib/libjsoncpp.a;general;/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/re2-prefix/src/re2/lib/libre2.a;general;/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco/tbb-prefix/src/tbb/lib_release/libtbb.a;


########################
# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ADDR2LINE
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created
CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/build_ebpf/falco
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=28
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/ctest
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_DLLTOOL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Executable file format

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of external makefile project generator.
CMAKE_EXTRA_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator.
CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Unix Makefiles
//Generator instance identifier.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_INSTANCE:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator platform.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator toolset.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET:INTERNAL=
//Source directory with the top level CMakeLists.txt file for this
// project
CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/src/falco

HAVE_STRLCAT:INTERNAL=

HAVE_STRLCPY:INTERNAL=
//Have include sys/mkdev.h
HAVE_SYS_MKDEV_H:INTERNAL=
//Have include sys/sysmacros.h
HAVE_SYS_SYSMACROS_H:INTERNAL=1

MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

ProcessorCount_cmd_nproc-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

ProcessorCount_cmd_sysctl-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

SITE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/home/carlos/work/falco-config/cross_compile/install_ebpf
